[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 1010000 2
2 1010000 2
3 1010000 2
4 0001110 3
5 0100000 1
6 0000000 a
7 0111101 5

01 10 1111101 6
12 21 1011101 5
23 32 1011001 4
34 43 1010000 2 match 1 2 3
45 54 1010000 2 match 1 2 3
56 65 1011110 5
67 76 0101110 4
70 07 0111101 5 match 7

02 20 0111101 5 match 7
13 31 1010101 4
24 42 1011001 4

46 64 1011110 5

71 17 1100101 4
